name: mostParamGetStringAscii
title: mostParamGetStringAscii
syntax: long mostParamGetStringAscii(mostAmsMessage msg, char paramAdr[], char buffer[], long buffersize); // form 1
long mostParamGetStringAscii(mostAmsMessage msg, char paramAdr[], long arrayIndex, char buffer[], long buffersize); // form 2
description: Query of parameters of the String type from an AMS message and decode to ASCII format using the parameter name from the XML function catalog. Unsupported characters are ignored.

parameters.name: msg
parameters.description: Message in which the parameter value should be described.

parameters.name: paramAdr
parameters.description: Identification of parameters (see Symbolic Identification of Parameters).

parameters.name: arrayIndex
parameters.description: Parameter index in arrays or sequences. This declaration overwrites the indexing in the brackets of <paramAdr>.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: Buffer to which the ASCII string parameter is copied.

parameters.name: bufferSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of copied ASCII string parameter bytes (can be specified with (elcount(buffer))).

description: Input: Message parameter bytes: 00 00 61 00 62 00 63 00 00Output: Radiotext: abc

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
